path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali will fight against traitors.jpeg
text: hakim:4675 - Abti Bakr b. Balawayh > Muhammad b. Yiinus al-Qurashi > ‘Abd al-Aziz b. al-Khattab > ‘AlT b. Ghurab b. Abii Fatimah > al-Asbagh b. Nubatah > Aba Ayyitib al-AnsarT [Machine] I heard the Prophet £ saying to Ali ibn Abi Talib, "You will fight against the traitors, the oppressors, and the rebels with swords, arrows, and spears." Abu Ayyub said, "O Messenger of Allah, with whom will you fight these people?" He said, "With Ali ibn Abi Talib." @ - No Grade (Dhahabi)
